 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-iqrb","title":"fcp-cli: Developer CLI Tooling","description":"# fcp-cli: Developer CLI Tooling

## Overview
Command-line tools for FCP connector development, testing, installation, and management.

## Commands

### Development
- `fcp new <name>` - Create new connector from template
- `fcp build` - Build connector binary
- `fcp check` - Run lints and validation
- `fcp test` - Run connector tests
- `fcp bench` - Run benchmarks

### Installation & Management
- `fcp install <connector>` - Install connector from registry
- `fcp uninstall <connector>` - Remove connector
- `fcp list` - List installed connectors
- `fcp update` - Update connectors
- `fcp search <query>` - Search connector registry

### Inspection
- `fcp info <connector>` - Show connector manifest
- `fcp verify <connector>` - Verify binary signature
- `fcp introspect <connector>` - Show capabilities and operations
- `fcp health <connector>` - Check connector health

### Configuration
- `fcp config` - Manage FCP configuration
- `fcp zone` - Manage zone definitions
- `fcp secret` - Manage secrets/credentials

### Debugging
- `fcp run <connector>` - Run connector in foreground
- `fcp logs <connector>` - View connector logs
- `fcp doctor` - Diagnose common issues
- `fcp debug <connector>` - Interactive debugging

### Registry
- `fcp login` - Authenticate to registry
- `fcp publish` - Publish connector to registry
- `fcp unpublish` - Remove from registry

## Features
- Tab completion (bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell)
- JSON output mode for scripting
- Colored terminal output
- Progress indicators
- Interactive prompts with fallback

## Dependencies
- clap (CLI framework)
- indicatif (progress bars)
- dialoguer (interactive prompts)
- fcp-core

## Cross-Platform
- Linux, macOS, Windows support
- Consistent behavior across platforms
- Platform-specific path handling","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:11:03.581644646-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:11:46.925457797-05:00"}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-k4ka","title":"fcp-graphql: GraphQL Client Infrastructure Library","description":"# fcp-graphql: GraphQL Client Infrastructure Library

## Overview
Shared GraphQL client library for connectors that interface with GraphQL APIs (Linear, GitHub, Notion, Shopify, etc.).

## Features

### Core Client
- Async GraphQL client with connection pooling
- Query/mutation/subscription support
- Automatic retry with exponential backoff
- Request batching and deduplication
- Query complexity estimation

### Query Building
- Type-safe query builder
- Fragment composition
- Variable handling
- Directive support

### Pagination
- Cursor-based pagination (Relay-style)
- Offset-based pagination
- Automatic page traversal
- Total count estimation

### Subscriptions
- WebSocket transport
- Reconnection handling
- Subscription multiplexing
- Heartbeat management

### Introspection
- Schema introspection caching
- Type validation
- Deprecation warnings

### Error Handling
- GraphQL error parsing
- Partial data handling
- Network error recovery
- Rate limit detection

## Dependencies
- reqwest (HTTP)
- tokio-tungstenite (WebSocket)
- serde_json
- fcp-core

## Consumers
- fcp.linear (GraphQL-only API)
- fcp.github (GraphQL API v4)
- fcp.notion (REST+GraphQL hybrid)
- fcp.shopify (Admin API)

## Testing
- Mock GraphQL server
- Response recording/playback
- Schema validation tests","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:10:53.615224102-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:11:35.210477464-05:00"}
